name: Not Safe! The RPG
description:
The not-too-distant future. You wake up to a changed city. From every phone, tv, and computer, hypnotic messages tell everyone that penises are "NOT SAFE." Penises must be made Safe. It is the duty of every man to lock himself in chastity. All women must ensure male genitalia are made SAFE. With a blink, you realize there's a chastity cage on your nightstand. "MAKE IT SAFE, MAKE IT SAFE," your phone tells you. Somehow, though, you manage to resist the hypnosis. You need to escape the city before it's too late.

UPDATE (3/17/26): Converted most encounters to Lorebooks, which should help with memory issues while also improving the quality of encounters. New cover image. Original image above, most recent image below:
